title: Aurora, 35002, Eco Nation, Elephant, 10.5In, Soft Toy, Grey, Medium
features: Eco Nation is Aurora World’s fabulous range of Soft Toy Animals made from Recycled Plastics
Every soft toy is made using recycled plastics to include the fibre fill. No more plastic beans
Using embroidered eyes instead of plastics to make this item as Eco-Friendly as possible
Created an extremely soft and touchable soft toy made for hugging and cuddles.
description: Eco Nation is Aurora World’s fabulous range of soft toys made from recycled plastics. Introducing our grey Elephant. Every soft toy animal has been made using recycled plastics to include the fibre fill. We have removed all plastic beans and are using embroidered instead of plastic eyes to make this item as Eco-friendly as possible. We are very proud to have created such a gorgeous collection of extremely soft and touchable soft toys which will make a great gift. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products.
